revision.comment: 1 revision imported: second run of importing xml edited files to get rid of the bad category
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Tfm/dated|page=STN|otherpage=Station|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 December 6#Template:STN|type=disabled|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}[[{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}} Station ({{{2}}})|{{{1}}} Station}}|{{{3|{{{1}}}}}}]]{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}} Station ({{{2}}})|{{{1}}} Station}}}}|[[Category:Internal link templates linking to redirects|S]]
}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Tfm/dated|page=STN|otherpage=Station|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 December 6#Template:STN|type=disabled|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}[[{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}} Station ({{{2}}})|{{{1}}} Station}}|{{{3|{{{1}}}}}}]]{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}} Station ({{{2}}})|{{{1}}} Station}}}}|[[Category:Internal link templates linking to redirects|S]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
